title: Adult Game
congratulations: Congratulations! You really know how to live an adult life.
irresponsible: No... You're irresponsible and showed that you don't know how to be an adult.
guideRules:
You receive a random salary and a set of bills. The total of all bills always exceeds your salary — you can't pay everything.

Choose which bills to pay and submit your selection. There is exactly ONE correct answer each day.

If your selection matches it perfectly, you win. If not... there's always tomorrow.

One play per day — resets at midnight (Brasília time).
